title: Mellow Golden Jamaican Sweet Potato Stew
description: A comforting Jamaican dish featuring sweet potatoes, cloves, and a glassy-jelly texture, served in a copper mug. This macrobiotic-friendly stew is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saute until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and saute for another minute.
Add the diced sweet potatoes, whole cloves, dried thyme, and diced scotch bonnet pepper, stirring to combine.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the sweet potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.
Remove the whole cloves and season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Ladle the stew into copper mugs and serve hot.
